videos.video_subject: Messi or Ronaldo: the greatest football debate of all time
videos.video_script: Messi or Ronaldo? Eight Ballon d'Ors against five. A World Cup against five Champions Leagues. One is pure magic. One is a relentless machine. You can only pick ONE. Drop your answer below.
